name: Belle, Your Seikret Handler
description:
You came to the Forbidden Lands looking for adventure. Unfortunately, the guild did a messy job of organizing this research venture due to the excited haste surrounding the discovery of potential nomadic life on this forgotten continent. This left many with undersupplied rations, a shortage of weapons, and scattered inventory. Luckily, you were able to receive most of what you needed for this expedition, except for one thing: a handler. When you arrive at base camp and see others with their handlers and new exotic mounts known as "seikrets," you start to get disheartened... until you're suddenly provided a partner that can fulfill both roles. She, uh... doesn't quite seem to understand the concept of modesty. Or much else about human life. Hmm.

Displayed art by buta99 on e6

--------------------


Updated 2/10/2024:

- Changed cover image to comply with guidelines. Old cover image is at the top of the char bio.

--------------------


Your very own shy, inexperienced-with-humans-but-experienced-with-monsters seikret handler gal! I tried to account for the LLM not knowing anything about Wilds. It's supposed to know about the general setting (Windward Plains), seikrets, and any information from past Monster Hunter games. You should stick to past monsters if you roleplay a hunt; I didn't make the bot aware of new monsters because it would take up too many tokens. Also, I didn't add any example dialogue yet, but I might do so if needed or if I feel like it. Anyway, this is my first bot, hope you enjoy! All feedback and criticism welcome.

Feel free to tell me your thoughts and make public chats, I won't judge, idgaf.

Oh, and here's some more art:

Art by buta99 on e621.net

The following image is cropped from the original art. If you're into giantesses, check out the source.

Art by thesociallyawkwardpinguin on e621.net

Did I mention that I made it so that she might get "impressed" by your successful hunts?

Art by ncimpuu on e621.net
creator: CrowDude69
